use_cases: Displaying key performance metrics and statistics in dashboard layouts
Organizing content into structured sections with headers and footers
Creating summary cards for financial or analytics dashboards
Building product showcase cards for e-commerce listings
Forming the base structure for any card-based UI layout
ai_summary: A flexible card component system providing Card, CardHeader, CardTitle, CardDescription, CardContent, and CardFooter subcomponents for building structured content containers. Uses forward refs for proper DOM access and a className utility for styling composition. Designed as a foundational building block for statistics displays and content organization in dashboard or listing interfaces.
